TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[623.960-669.430] interviewee: On Sunday, we took trips or hikes. And already during the trips and hikes, I was always concerned about my next ones. When we went on a bicycle ride, I saw a girl or a boy stood behind could make it so fast, I went back and I helped them. I was always worried about other ones. I tried to help. And this was my nature.
[669.430-722.850] interviewee: And later on, when I returned from the university in
